title: pelargonium × eximium
intro: Pelargonium × eximium, also known as the Cape Geranium or Barberton Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Pelargonium genus, characterized by its distinctive foliage and vibrant flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral compounds that can help to soothe and calm the skin. The health benefits of Pelargonium × eximium include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
